notes: Termination DateFor termination of certain provisions of this chapter, see .section 4564(a) of this title

Codification, , comprising this chapter, was formerly set out in the Appendix to this title, prior to the elimination of the Appendix to this title and the editorial reclassification of the Act as this chapter. For disposition of sections of the former Appendix to this title, see Table II, set out preceding .Act Sept. 8, 1950, ch. 93264 Stat. 798section 1 of this titleChapter is comprised of the portions of , as amended, that had not previously been repealed when the Act was editorially reclassified as this chapter. As enacted, this Act contained titles I through VII. Titles II, IV, V, and VI of the Act were repealed by , , . Titles I, III, and VII of the Act have been codified in this chapter to appear as subchapters I to III, respectively.
